description: Stylish & Functional A5 Floral Notebook Looking for a floral A5 notebook that’s both beautiful and practical? The Wild Bloom Pastel Pink Notebook is designed for work, school, and personal journaling , featuring a cute flower notebook cover with a soft pastel pink finish. Premium Lined Pages for Everyday Writing Inside, you’ll find 80 sheets (160 pages) of 80gsm FSC-certified lined paper , providing a smooth writing surface with minimal ink bleed. Whether you need an A5 notebook for work , a journal for daily reflections , or a planner for organization , this lined notebook is a versatile choice. Durable & Travel-Friendly This A5 notebook hardback is built to last, with a sturdy cover that protects your notes. Its portable A5 size (21cm x 15cm) makes it perfect for taking notes on the go—whether at school, the office, or home . Elegant Features for Convenience Designed with a built-in ribbon bookmark , this A5 lined notebook allows you to easily keep your place in your notes, journal, or diary. The stylish flowery notebook design makes it a standout addition to any stationery collection. Perfect for Work, Study & Gifting Ideal for students, professionals, and stationery lovers , this notebook for women and girls is a great gift for birthdays, Christmas, or back-to-school essentials . Whether you're journaling, planning, or organizing tasks , this A5 notebook lined for school or work is the perfect stationery essential. Get your Wild Bloom Pastel Pink Floral A5 Notebook today and enjoy a stylish, practical, and beautifully designed notebook for everyday use ! Read more
